title: Tower T27013 Deep Fill Sandwich Maker with Extra Deep, Non-Stick Plates, Automatic Temperature Control, 900W, Silver and Black
features: 4 POCKET MOULDS: Extra-deep moulds provide enough space to serve up to 2 deliciously filled toasties packed full of your favourite ingredients, ideal for a speedy family lunch or afternoon snack
ULTRA FAST HEAT UP: Powerful 900W output provides ultra-fast heat-up and crispy golden-brown results for delicious toasted sandwiches i

NON-STICK PLATES: Each plate has a high quality non-stick coating that prevents your food from sticking to the plates for fuss-free cleaning. Little to no oil is required so you can enjoy healthier meals

AUTOMATIC TEMPERATURE CONTROL: Maintains an optimal cooking temperature for consistent toasting. Simply pop your sandwich onto the grill plate and it will cook evenly every time to ensure the perfect taste and texture.
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1-year manufacturer’s guarantee and an extra 2 years when you register the product online.
description: From the manufacturer Specifications Easy clean non-stick cooking surface Plate ridges Automatic temperature control Cool touch housing Product dimensions: H10.20cm x W29.00cm x D24.50cm Grill your best loved sandwiches with all your favourite fillings stress-free! You simply fill each of the moulds with your chosen ingredients, shut the lid, locking it in place with the latch and sit back while your sandwich maker grills away with its automatic temperature control.. It also features cool touch handle and non-slip feet for durability and added safety during use. Its silver and black stainless steel body adds a touch of contemporary style while its compact design is suitable for storage saving you valuable space on your countertop. Powerful 900W for quick and efficient grilling 4 extra deep pocket style moulds to create 2 sandwiches Easy clean non-stick cooking surface for fast and simple maintenance Non-slip feet provide stability on your kitchen countertop Rose gold stainless steel exterior adds an elegant finishing touch
